landmarks.innerText: Your browser or operating system is out of date and Semrush might not be displayed correctly. Please update your browser or operating system.
Products Pricing Resources Enterprise Log In Sign Up

About Us Semrush powers brand visibility across search and AI-driven discovery. WHO ARE WE? Semrush is the intelligence engine for ambitious marketers obsessed with winning. From startups to global enterprises, we’re the unified platform behind modern brand visibility — bringing SEO authority and AI visibility intelligence together in one system. As discovery expands beyond rankings into AI answers, social platforms, and competitive ecosystems, we give teams the clarity to see where they stand — and the tools to move ahead with confidence. OUR MISSION To be the marketer’s unfair advantage. In an AI-driven discovery landscape, brands need more than data. They need intelligence — to understand their visibility, uncover opportunity, and win where decisions are shaped. Trusted by the world’s leading brands SEMRUSH EVOLUTION From SEO pioneer to digital brand visibility leader — our evolution mirrors the evolution of discovery itself. What began as a single SEO tool has grown into a unified intelligence platform spanning search, AI visibility, competitive intelligence, content, and beyond. 20 08 Semrush was founded. Single tool developed for private use. 09 Pilot product launched with three employees. 12 Semrush registered as a U.S. company. First U.S. office opened in Trevose, Pennsylvania. 4 tools comprised the Semrush platform. 13 Marketing department established—before this, growth was driven by word of mouth. 14 8 tools comprised the Semrush platform. 15 Expansion to the EU: Offices opened in Prague and Limassol. 16 21 tools comprised the Semrush platform. 17 27 tools in the Semrush platform. Semrush Academy launched, providing online courses, expert training, and digital marketing certifications. 18 Boston HQ established, followed by a third U.S. office. 20 Acquired Prowly, the company expands to Poland. 55+ tools comprised the Semrush platform. 21 Semrush listed publicly on NYSE. Semrush App Center launched, enabling third-party app integration. 22 Major geographical expansion: Offices opened in Amsterdam, Barcelona, Berlin, Belgrade, Yerevan, and Austin. Acquired Backlinko and Kompyte. 23 Milestones reached: 100,000 paying customers and 1,000,000 free registered active users. Acquired Traffic Think Tank. 25+ new apps in the App Center. 24 Acquired Ryte, Exploding Topics and took a majority stake in Brand24. 25 Semrush One launches, unifying traditional SEO and AI visibility into a single intelligence engine for modern discovery. 26 Semrush becomes an Adobe company. 18 years of experience 10M users have already tried Semrush 156 countries served 11 offices worldwide BUILT FOR EVERY STAGE OF GROWTH Brand visibility isn’t a single channel. It’s a system that scales with ambition. Semrush adapts to how you compete — whether you’re building your first campaign or orchestrating global visibility across regions and teams. For Enterprises Enterprise visibility demands coordination, scale, and precision. Semrush Enterprise unifies SEO authority and AI visibility across markets — aligning teams, automating workflows, and integrating with complex tech stacks. From regional execution to global strategy, enterprises gain full visibility across search engines and AI-driven discovery surfaces. Visit page → For Entrepreneurs and SMBs Compete like a category leader. Semrush gives growing businesses the intelligence to understand where they stand, uncover high-impact opportunities, and execute with speed. World-class visibility. Built for momentum. Visit page → For Agencies Agencies manage visibility across brands, channels, and now AI-driven discovery. Semrush centralizes client reporting, competitive intelligence, and AI visibility tracking in one platform — enabling agencies to deliver measurable growth at scale. Visit page → HOW WE HELP MARKETERS WIN Picsart: the Art of Efficiency The creative design platform automated internal linking with Semrush Enterprise and increased clicks by 20%. Pastreez: "Macarons Near Me" Learn how a family bak

GET STARTED WITH SEMRUSH TODAY Try Semrush free for seven days. Cancel anytime. Start free trial Semrush Semrush One Features Pricing Free Trial Compare Semrush Success Stories Stats and Facts Affiliate Program More tools Enterprise SEO Enterprise AIO Enterprise SI Insights24 Mfour App Center Top Websites Free Tools Sensor Company About Us News Careers Partners Semrush Select Global Issues Index Do not sell my personal info Contact Us Support Knowledge Base Academy Semrush API Community Semrush Blog Webinars Ambassador Program © 2026 Semrush Holdings. All rights reserved. Privacy Policy Terms of Service Cookies Settings English
